entry.value: Class: Rule Id/Name: Validation-Vikas-TaskOne Action: run in Debug Object Browser by User spadmin

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?> <!DOCTYPE ProvisioningPlan PUBLIC "sailpoint.dtd" "sailpoint.dtd"> <ProvisioningPlan> <AccountRequest application="ActiveDirectory" op="Modify"> <AttributeRequest name="memberOf" op="Add" value="CN=All_Users,OU=Groups,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com"/> <AttributeRequest name="userAccountControl" op="Add" value="514"/> </AccountRequest> <AccountRequest application="LDAPApplication" op="Modify"> <AttributeRequest name="groups" op="Add" value="cn=Users,ou=Group,dc=my-domain,dc=com"/> <AttributeRequest name="businessCategory" value="Inactive"/> </AccountRequest> </ProvisioningPlan>
